ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – Action Required
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Please be advised that the corporate VPN infrastructure will undergo routine maintenance on **Monday, 20 April 2026, 02:00 – 04:00 UTC**. During this window, VPN connectivity will be unavailable.

**What you need to do:**
1. Save any active work before 01:45 UTC.
2. Restart your VPN client after 04:15 UTC.
3. If you encounter any issues, open a ticket on the IT portal: <URL>.

This maintenance is part of our quarterly security update cycle and will improve connection stability and security. Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
IT Operations Team

spam.subject: Your Scholarship Award Pending – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Applicant,

We are pleased to inform you that you have been shortlisted for the **Global Excellence Scholarship 2026** awarded by the prestigious International University of Innovation.

To secure your award, you must complete the verification process within **48 hours**. Failure to do so will result in forfeiture of the scholarship.

Please click the link below and provide the required documents:
<URL>

Note: The scholarship amount is **₹5,00,000** and will be disbursed upon successful verification.

If you have any questions, reply to this email or call our hotline (no-cost): 1800‑123‑456.

Congratulations and welcome aboard!

Sincerely,
Admissions Office
International University of Innovation
